phrases.intent_en: Where is the water park ticket booth?
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το ταμείο του νεροτσουλισιού;
phrases.cultural_note: Νεροτσουλίσιο refers to the Faliraki Water Park as a stable target. Visitors expect ticket booths to be at the entrance by default.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Faliraki Water Park.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Faliraki Water Park.

phrases.cultural_note: Bar promoters (προωθητές) actively advertise shot promotions on Bar Street (Οδός Μουσών). Promotions may vary by night and bar.

likely_response.local: Ναι, στο Bar Street και στο Banana Bar.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, many bars have promotions tonight.

responses.english: Yes, many bars have promotions tonight.
responses.french: Ναι, στο Bar Street και στο Banana Bar.

phrases.intent_en: Do I fix taxi fare before riding?
phrases.text_local: Πρέπει να συμφωνώ τιμή ταξί πριν την βόλτα;
phrases.cultural_note: Τaxi drivers in Rhodes typically negotiate fixed fares upfront, especially for longer distances like to Anthony Quinn Bay or Tsambika viewpoints.
